creator: meta@FreeBSD.org
text:
I already use generating patches by version control. 

* edit files in the source git repo
* git diff --no-prefix > ${XRDP_DEVEL_PORT_DIR}/files/patch-foobar

Additionally, I modify files in post-patch target because some paths should be 
replaced with variables such as ${PREFIX}. I believe patches in files directory
cannot do this. Is this correct, right?
